what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset named p-09 in the design-source channel, declaring it as source design ground-truth for presentation-15p/p-09.jpg.
observations: YAML frontmatter ledger entry for an image asset
mime is image/jpeg but width and height are both 0
source field is set to design_source_material
author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r with an ISO 8601 created timestamp
body contains only a one-line SOURCE design ground-truth label
standouts: Explicitly labeled as SOURCE design ground-truth
Image dimensions are recorded as 0 despite being an image/jpeg record
Contains a blob reference but no descriptive caption or alt text
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured asset metadata
Follows the image__<channel>_<path> ledger naming pattern
References binary content via a blob:// URI
Records provenance via author_session and created fields
concerns: Width and height are 0, which is unusual for an image record
No links to related assets or contexts
Lacks any caption, alt text, or visual description beyond the filename
notes: A sparse ledger stub for a design-source presentation slide image with a blob pointer and unresolved dimensions.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What visual content does p-09.jpg contain?
Is the blob reference resolvable and where is the actual image stored?
Was this record generated automatically or authored manually?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to catalog a design-source image asset; actual content is a minimal metadata stub with zero dimensions and no caption, so it only partially fulfills rich cataloging.
intention_signals: To register a specific presentation image as authoritative design-source material and associate it with a retrievable blob identifier.
contribution: Provides a stable identifier and blob pointer for a design-source image asset, plus provenance metadata (author session, creation time, source category) that a fused system could retain for asset retrieval and lineage.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata record for the image asset p-09 in the design-source channel, labeled as source design ground-truth for presentation-15p/p-09.jpg, with a blob reference and zero recorded dimensions.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and preserve provenance for a design-source presentation slide image asset.
